zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Carter於1362年出生在英國英格蘭艾可格斯費爾德時，她的父親Thomas Carter26歲，母親Mary Tanner27歲。她於1379年與Thomas John Crochrode在英國英格蘭艾可托培斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年在英國英格蘭艾可托培斯費爾德享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Carter was born in 1362, in Gosfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Carter, was 26 and her mother, Mary Tanner, was 27. She married Thomas John Crochrode in 1379, in Toppesfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1444, in Toppesfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Carter est née en 1362, à Gosfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Carter, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Tanner, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas John Crochrode en 1379, à Toppesfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1444, à Toppesfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Carter(이)가 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 고스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Carter(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Tanner(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 토페스필드에서 Thomas John Crochrode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 토페스필드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Carter родилась в 1362 г. в местности госфиелд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Carter было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Tanner, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas John Crochrode в 1379 г. в местности топпесфиелд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1444 г. в местности топпесфиелд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.
